'''Adray Terson''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] living on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to and during the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She and her husband, [[Hasville Terson|Hasville]], owned and operated the [[Terson Comfort Carriers]] [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] company. Adray and Hasville had a son, [[Hasray Terson|Hasray]], who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Denua Ku]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1stm}}
